name: Wild Pig on Sauerkraut
recipeIngredient: 42 1/3 oz Pork shoulder, wild or tame
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and fry the pork on all sides in it.
2. Add the salt, pepper, and smashed juniper berries.
3. Preheat the oven to 225°C and bake the pork for half an hour, basting it with its juices a couple of times.
4. Heat the Crisco in a pot and sauté the sauerkraut briefly in it.
5. Add the bay leaves, whole juniper berries, grated apples, and white wine. Let simmer on medium heat for 30 minutes.
6. Place the pork on top of the sauerkraut and pour the juices over it.
7. Return to the oven and bake at 170°C for another 35 minutes.
8. Slice the pork and serve on top of kraut with beer.
